heading: Additional priority of remedies after finding of de jure segregation
label: 1755 Additional priority of remedies after finding of de jure segregation
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, after no court of the United States shall order the implementation of any plan to remedy a finding of de jure segregation which involves the transportation of students, unless the court first finds that all alternative remedies are inadequate.June 30, 1974
notes: Effective DateSection effective on and after sixtieth day after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 21, 1974section 2(c) of Pub. L. 93–380section 1221–1 of this title
